⍞ Materials: Paper Sloyd for Primary Grades, cardstock, ruler, pencil, scissors, tape, compass, glue

➜ VIEW
Photo of the model and tutorial.
∞ Image & Video Link: Pyramidal Catch-All

➜ PRACTICE

Third Year Models "II. Pyramidal Catch-All" p.42
Stuff this catch-all with candy or other small trinkets, and give it as a gift. It is also great to use as a party favor. You can change the color of cardstock to fit your event theme.
